UG-33  FORMED HEADS, PRESSURE ON CONVEX SIDE. (a) The required thickness of formed heads under pressure on the convex side shall be determined as for a complete sphere, using the external pressure procedures of UG-28. (b) The crown radius and knuckle radius shall meet the dimensional requirements of this paragraph. The maximum allowable stress values shall be in accordance with UG-23. (c) For heads under concave pressure, see UG-32. The joint efficiency from UW-12 shall be applied. Thickness shall include corrosion allowance as required by UG-25. For flat heads, refer to UG-34.
